body: {"detail":"description drops commitment \"non_scope:No broad WARN/BLOCK policy changes; those are in ddx-91898f19.\"","intake_outcome":"operator_required"}
Accepted for retry: original bead text preserves the required NON-SCOPE boundary and is execution-ready; pre-claim rewrite loss should not park this work.

{"detail":"This is not atomic. TD-031 §7.2 says proposed-\u003eopen triage is the operator-acceptance signal for readiness idempotency, but the repo has multiple acceptance paths (`cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_mutation_beads.go:205-249` via `BeadReopen`/`BeadApprove`, plus `Store.Reopen` in `cli/internal/bead/store.go:1372-1410`) while the repeat-parking bug lives in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go:2780-2815`. The bead also mixes two independently testable changes: durable acceptance-marker plumbing and fingerprint-based suppression of repeat parking after the same finding. Those should be split before claim.","intake_outcome":"too_large_decomposed"}
